title: Make countLines CRLF-safe
prompt:
countLines miscounts Windows text: splitting 'a
b
c' on '
' leaves  on the pieces. Make it line-ending agnostic so countLines('a
b
c') === 3 and countLines('x
y
') === 2 (blank trailing piece ignored, and a piece that is just  must not count). lines.mjs:
export function countLines(text) {
  return text.split('
').filter((l) => l.length > 0).length;
}
